Litigation and Other Contingencies</span></ix:nonNumeric></div><ix:continuation id="f-906-1" continuedAt="f-906-2"><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:582.15pt;width:612pt"><span style="color:#0c479d;font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:bold;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:42.19pt">Litigation</span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:599.15pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:512.95pt">A variety of claims have been made against ExxonMobil and certain of its consolidated subsidiaries in a number of pending</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.45pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:611.15pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:512.87pt">lawsuits. Management has regular litigation reviews, including updates from corporate and outside counsel, to assess the need</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.37pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:623.15pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:266.26pt">for accounting recognition or disclosure of these contingencies. </span><ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c-1" name="us-gaap:CommitmentsAndContingenciesPolicyTextBlock" id="f-907" continuedAt="f-907-1" escape="true"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:315.76pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:246.67pt">The Corporation accrues an undiscounted liability for those</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.43pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></ix:nonNumeric></div><ix:continuation id="f-907-1"><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:635.15pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:512.94pt">contingencies where the incurrence of a loss is probable and the amount can be reasonably estimated. If a range of amounts can</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.44pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:647.15pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:512.98pt">be reasonably estimated and no amount within the range is a better estimate than any other amount, then the minimum of the</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.48pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:659.15pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:512.84pt">range is accrued. The Corporation does not record liabilities when the likelihood that the liability has been incurred is probable</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.34pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:671.15pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:512.91pt">but the amount cannot be reasonably estimated or when the liability is believed to be only reasonably possible or remote. For</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.41pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:683.15pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:512.93pt">contingencies where an unfavorable outcome is reasonably possible and which are significant, the Corporation discloses the</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.43pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="font-size:12pt;line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:695.15pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:512.87pt">nature of the contingency and, where feasible, an estimate of the possible loss. For purposes of our contingency disclosures,</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.37pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div as well as other matters, which management believes should be disclosed.</span></div></ix:continuation></ix:continuation></div></div><div serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:512.95pt">volume-determining drivers. These drivers consist of net interest changes specified in Production Sharing Contracts (PSCs),</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.45pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:650.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:512.89pt">which typically occur when cumulative investment returns or production volumes achieve defined thresholds, changes in equity</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.39pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:662.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:512.9pt">upon achieving pay-out in partner investment carry situations, equity redeterminations as specified in venture agreements, or as</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.4pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:674.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:512.78pt">a result of the termination or expiry of a concession. Once a net interest change has occurred, it typically will not be reversed by</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.28pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:686.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:198.4pt">subsequent events, such as lower crude oil prices.</span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:703.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:italic;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:153.89pt">Entitlements - Price / Spend / Other</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:203.39pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:359.1pt"> are changes to ExxonMobil&#8217;s share of production volumes resulting from temporary</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.49pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:715.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:512.87pt">changes to non-operational volume-determining drivers. These drivers include changes in oil and gas prices or spending levels</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.37pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:727.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:512.88pt">from one period to another. According to the terms of contractual arrangements or government royalty regimes, price or</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.38pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:739.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:512.88pt">spending variability can increase or decrease royalty burdens and/or volumes attributable to ExxonMobil. For example, at</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.38pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div></div></div><div style="--justify:justify;--position:absolute;background-color:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #CCCC;content-visibility:auto;float:none;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:0;height:792pt;margin:10px auto 10px auto;overflow:hidden;padding:0;position:relative;width:612pt;word-wrap:break-word"><div style="position:var(--position);top:751.5pt"><div style="width:513pt"><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:17.92pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:301pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre">22</span></div></div></div><div style="position:var(--position)"><div style="width:513pt"><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);top:13.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="color:#6d6d6d;font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:490.92pt;position:var(--position);text-decoration:none;white-space:pre"><a style="color:inherit;text-decoration:inherit;z-index:1" href="#i3fa947d5ca3846dca30fa994179f4ef9_7">Table of Contents</a></span></div></div></div><div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:40.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:512.9pt">higher prices, fewer barrels are required for ExxonMobil to recover its costs. These effects generally vary from period to period</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.4pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:52.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:512.89pt">with field spending patterns or market prices for oil and natural gas. Such drivers can also include other temporary changes in</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.39pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:49.5pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:285.76pt">net interest as dictated by specific provisions in production agreements.</span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:81.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:141.43pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:420.95pt"> are changes to ExxonMobil's sustainable production levels as a result of production limits or sanctions</span><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman', serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:562.38pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:2.5pt"> </span></div><div serif;font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;left:98.32pt;position:var(--position);white-space:pre;width:464.13pt"> are reductions in ExxonMobil&#8217;s production arising from commercial consideration.</span></div><div style="line-height:10pt;position:var(--position);text-align:justify;text-align-last:var(--justify);top:139.5pt;width:612pt"><span style="font-family:'Times New Roman',
